name: Lost Balloon
description: A kid's balloon is stuck in a tree outside City Hall and the whole block has stopped to watch.
briefing: Some poor kid is bawling because a balloon is snagged twenty feet up a tree. Somebody with a little **mobility** needs to shimmy up there before the tears turn into a whole afternoon.

disruption.prompt: Branch just cracked under your weight. You've got about two seconds before you and the balloon both come down — what's the move?

options.label: Hop to the next branch
options.passText: Clean hop, clean grab. The kid never even saw you wobble.
options.failText: Missed the branch and rode it down — landed hard, balloon included.

options.label: Brace and ride it down slow
options.passText: Absorbed the fall like a pro, balloon still in hand.
options.failText: Braced too stiff — hit the ground wrong and dropped the balloon anyway.

options.label: Ride a jet of water down like a slide
options.passText: Waterboy conjures a soft stream and surfs down it, balloon in hand, kid screaming with delight.
options.failText: Not applicable — Waterboy doesn't miss this one.

name: Help Grandma Cross the Road
description: An elderly woman refuses to cross Cravens Ave without an escort, and traffic is backing up.
briefing: Grandma's parked herself at the curb on Cravens and isn't budging without an escort — someone **charming** enough to **talk her** across before rush hour turns into a parking lot.

disruption.prompt: Grandma's stopped dead in the crosswalk to lecture a honking driver, and the light's about to turn. Get her moving.

options.label: Sweet-talk her forward
options.passText: She pats your cheek, calls you a nice young man, and finishes the crossing on her own steam.
options.failText: She's not buying it — you end up half-carrying her the rest of the way.

options.label: Scoop her up and hustle across
options.passText: Quick and gentle — she's back on the curb before the light even turns.
options.failText: Nearly dropped her mid-street; you both stumble the rest of the way, rattled.

name: Beach Clean Up
description: Torrance Beach is buried under a tide of washed-up junk before the weekend crowds arrive.
briefing: Low tide dumped a small landfill's worth of trash on the sand. Nothing dangerous, just **heavy** bags and a lot of it — bring someone who can **endure** the smell and the sun.

name: Sewage Clog
description: A backed-up storm drain is threatening to flood the intersection above Sewer Junction C-4.
briefing: Junction C-4 is backed up and about to bubble over onto the street. Someone who can **hold** their breath and **endure** the stench needs to clear the clog by hand.

disruption.prompt: The clog just shifted and the backpressure is building fast — whatever's holding it back is about to let go all at once.

options.label: Muscle the clog free by hand
options.passText: Ripped it loose in one go and rode out the flush without flinching.
options.failText: Got the clog moving but the backpressure knocked you flat into the muck.

options.label: Redirect the flow through the side grate first
options.passText: Smart call — the side grate bleeds off the pressure and the clog comes apart clean.
options.failText: Grate was already jammed too — the backpressure wins and everyone gets soaked.

options.label: Bend the backpressure around himself
options.passText: Waterboy just tells the water where to go — it listens, and Junction C-4 clears without a drop out of place.
options.failText: Not applicable — Waterboy doesn't miss this one.

name: Cray Cray Bidet
description: A smart-home bidet at Del la Monice has glitched into a pressure-washer and won't shut off.
briefing: Some idiot's smart bidet is malfunctioning and turning a bathroom into a geyser. Somebody needs to **disarm** the control panel with a little **puzzle**-solving before the whole building floods.

name: Superhero Squabble in Aisle 9
description: Two off-duty costumed heroes are brawling over a parking spot in the Del Amo Mall food court.
briefing: Two costumed idiots are **brawling** over a parking spot by the food court — someone needs to **talk them down** before the produce stand becomes a crime scene.

disruption.prompt: One of the costumed idiots just threw an actual punch and a food court table went with it — this is escalating past shouting.

options.label: Physically wedge them apart
options.passText: Pinned both of them by the shoulders until the fight went out of their arms.
options.failText: Got caught in the crossfire and took a punch meant for the other guy.

options.label: Call out both their old sidekick names, loudly
options.passText: Public humiliation works better than reason — they freeze, then slink off separately.
options.failText: They just get louder about it — now it's a three-way shouting match.

name: Talent of Torrance
description: The annual Talent of Torrance show at City Hall needs a chaperone before the judges start throwing chairs.
briefing: The Talent of Torrance finale is one bad joke away from a riot. Get someone in there who can **charm** the crowd and keep the **negotiate**-and-smile act going until the trophies are handed out.

name: Roast of Mayor Yao
description: The Mayor's charity roast at Granny's Donuts is spiraling as the jokes get personal and the crowd turns ugly.
briefing: The Mayor's roast has gone off-script and the crowd is getting rowdy. Someone needs to **charm** the room back onto the agenda and **negotiate** a graceful exit for the Mayor's dignity.

disruption.prompt: Someone in the crowd just yelled the Mayor's real height out loud and the room smells blood in the water — this is one bad beat from a pile-on.

options.label: Grab the mic and redirect the joke at yourself
options.passText: You take the hit for the room, the crowd laughs WITH you, and the Mayor gets a breather.
options.failText: The joke lands flat and now they're roasting you too — double the damage control.

options.label: Read the crowd and cue the band to cut in
options.passText: Perfectly timed musical interruption — the moment dissolves into applause.
options.failText: Cut in half a beat too late; the room's already turned ugly by the time the band starts.

name: Fight at Crypto-Night
description: A crypto meetup at the Crypto Night lounge has erupted into a full brawl over a rug-pull.
briefing: A room full of angry investors just found out their coin is worthless and they're **brawling** over the bar. Bring **combat**-ready muscle, and someone who can **talk down** the ringleaders before this makes the news.

disruption.prompt: Someone just flipped a table onto the bar and the ringleader is rallying the rest of the room to rush the exits — this could turn into a stampede.

options.label: Body-block the exits and hold the line
options.passText: You hold the doorway like a wall — the stampede breaks against you and stalls out.
options.failText: Got swept off your feet by the crowd — the exit's wide open and chaos pours out.

options.label: Talk the ringleader down mid-rally
options.passText: You get right in his face and remind him whose coin this actually was — the rally dies on his lips.
options.failText: He shouts right over you and the room surges past both of you.

name: Museum Robbery
description: A crew is mid-heist at the Torrance College annex museum, and the vault door is on a timer.
briefing: A crew's got the annex vault cracked open on a countdown. Someone needs to **disarm** the alarm grid with real **puzzle**-solving smarts while the rest hold the line if it turns into a **fight**.

disruption.prompt: The crew just triggered a secondary laser grid you didn't know about — it's re-arming in seconds and it's between you and the vault.

options.label: Hack the grid's re-arm sequence
options.passText: You catch the sequence mid-cycle and null it out before it locks back on.
options.failText: Guessed the sequence wrong — the grid arms and you take a graze crossing it.

options.label: Thread the beams by hand
options.passText: A tight, silent contortion act gets you through without tripping a single beam.
options.failText: Clip a beam on the way through — alarms everywhere, and the crew scatters.

options.label: Bend the beams around the whole team
options.passText: Prism refracts every beam a few inches wide — the grid re-arms around empty air while the team walks straight through.
options.failText: Not applicable — Prism doesn't miss this one.

name: LARP Gone Wrong
description: A backyard LARP session at Madrona Marsh has escalated into real weapons and real injuries.
briefing: A foam-sword LARP session in the marsh got out of hand and somebody brought real steel — this is a genuine **brawl** now. Bring **combat** muscle that can **endure** a long night in the mud, plus someone sharp enough to **plan** a way to stand it down.

name: Blaze in the Burbs
description: A row of suburban houses near the Sardine is fully engulfed, with residents still trapped inside.
briefing: A whole row of houses is going up fast and there are people still inside. Whoever goes in needs to **endure** serious **hazmat**-grade heat, move **fast** through the smoke, and get everyone out before the roofs go.

disruption.prompt: A support beam just gave way in the second house and there's a family still on the stairs — the whole floor is about to go.

options.label: Shoulder the beam and clear the stairs
options.passText: You hold the beam up on pure grit while the family scrambles past underneath.
options.failText: The beam wins — you get everyone clear but take a bad hit doing it.

options.label: Sprint them out before the floor drops
options.passText: Three trips up and down in the time it takes to blink — everyone's out before the floor goes.
options.failText: Floor gives out mid-carry — a rough landing, but you're both still moving.

options.label: Blast a water tunnel through the collapse
options.passText: Waterboy punches a wall of water straight through the collapsing floor, carrying the family out on the current, steam and all.
options.failText: Not applicable — Waterboy doesn't miss this one.

name: Runaway Train
description: A freight train has lost its brakes at the Torrance Rail Yard and is barreling toward the platform.
briefing: Brakes are gone and a fully loaded freight train is barreling toward the platform. Someone needs to move **fast** across town, **chase** it down the tracks, and out-**puzzle** the failsafe before it derails into the yard.

name: Bank Robbery
description: An armed crew has barricaded themselves inside a Del Amo-area bank with hostages and a getaway plan.
briefing: Armed crew, hostages, and a vault full of demands — this one's a full **fight** if it goes loud. Bring **combat** muscle that can **endure** a standoff, and someone who can **negotiate** the hostages out before anyone pulls a trigger.
